metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.7-beta.10
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Removes nested Child windows from the Help section renderer. - Keeps one scrollable Child for the complete localized Help body. - Fixes the ReaImGui EndChild assertion when opening Help. - Retains the Heritage contrast and refreshed README previews from Beta 9.
